executives.name: Arvind Krishna
executives.background: Arvind Krishna is the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of IBM. He was elected Chairman of the Board in December 2020 and CEO in April 2020. He was previously Senior Vice President, Cloud and Cognitive Software, and was a principal architect of the acquisition of Red Hat.

executives.name: James Kavanaugh
executives.background: James J. Kavanaugh is Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, a position he has held since January 2018. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Transformation and Operations.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Alex Gorsky
executives.background: Alex Gorsky is the former Chairman and CEO of Johnson & Johnson. He joined the IBM Board in 2021.

executives.name: Andrew Liveris
executives.background: Mr. Liveris has served as Chairman of our Board since 2021. He is the former Chairman and CEO of The Dow Chemical Company and former Executive Chairman of DowDuPont. He serves on the boards of Saudi Aramco, IBM, and Worley.

executives.name: David Farr
executives.background: David N. Farr was Chairman and CEO of Emerson Electric Co.

executives.name: Johny Srouji
executives.background: Johny Srouji is Apple’s senior vice president of Hardware Technologies, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Johny built one of the world’s strongest and most innovative teams of silicon and technology engineers, overseeing breakthrough custom silicon and hardware technologies.

executives.name: Judith Marks
executives.background: Chair, CEO and President of Otis Worldwide Corporation.

executives.name: Marianne Brown
executives.background: Marianne C. Brown was Co-Chief Operating Officer, Global Financial Solutions, of Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS).

executives.name: Mark Papermaster
executives.background: Mr. Papermaster is AMD’s Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer. He joined AMD in 2011. Previously, he was Vice President of the Silicon Engineering Group at Cisco Systems, Inc. and Senior Vice President of Devices Hardware Engineering at Apple Inc. He also spent 26 years at IBM.

executives.name: Michelle Howard
executives.background: Retired Admiral of the United States Navy. Former Commander of U.S. Naval Forces Europe and U.S. Naval Forces Africa.

executives.name: Prabhakar Raghavan
executives.background: Prabhakar Raghavan has served as Senior Vice President, Knowledge & Information at Google since June 2020. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Ads, Commerce and Payments from 2018 to 2020. Before joining Google in 2012, he was at Yahoo! Labs.

executives.name: Rani Borkar
executives.background: Rani Borkar is Corporate Vice President, Azure Hardware Systems and Infrastructure at Microsoft Corporation. She previously held leadership roles at Intel and IBM.

executives.name: Sumit Sadana
executives.background: Sumit Sadana is Executive Vice President and Chief Business Officer. He joined Micron in 2017 from SanDisk, where he was Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer.

executives.name: Thomas Buberl
executives.background: Thomas Buberl has been the Chief Executive Officer and a director of AXA S.A. since 2016.

executives.name: Virginia Rometty
executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of IBM.

board_of_directors.name: Thomas Buberl
board_of_directors.background: Thomas Buberl has been the Chief Executive Officer and a director of AXA S.A. since 2016.

board_of_directors.name: David Farr

board_of_directors.name: Marianne Brown
board_of_directors.background: Marianne C. Brown was Co-Chief Operating Officer, Global Financial Solutions, of Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS).

board_of_directors.name: Alex Gorsky
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gorsky is the former Chairman and CEO of Johnson & Johnson, where he served as Chairman and CEO from 2012 to 2021 and Executive Chairman in 2022.

board_of_directors.name: Andrew Liveris
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Liveris has served as Chairman of our Board since 2021. He is the former Chairman and CEO of The Dow Chemical Company and former Executive Chairman of DowDuPont. He serves on the boards of Saudi Aramco, IBM, and Worley.

board_of_directors.background: Retired Admiral of the United States Navy. Former Commander of U.S. Naval Forces Europe and U.S. Naval Forces Africa.
